title: Grizzly Fluted Ring Cake Tin - Non-Stick Carbon Steel Pan - High Rim 22 cm (8.6 inch) – Black, Round Mould
features: CLASSIC DESIGN - This fluted ring cake tin features a continental design with a round shape, deep tube in the middle, and swirled surface.
ROBUST MATERIAL - Crafted from thick carbon steel, this bakeware is strong, durable, and suitable for traditional ovens up to 230 °C.
PERFECT BAKING - The mould ensures fast and even heat distribution for perfect baking results. The high rolled rim adds extra stability and safety.
EASY RELEASE - The 2-layer non-stick coating, free from BPA and PTFE, keeps baked goods in perfect shape and makes cleaning easy.
IDEAL SIZE - Perfect for creating delicious desserts for any occasion, this tin has an external diameter of 23 cm and a height of 11 cm.
description: Product Description Elegant design meets functionality – the perfect shape for all your baking ideas. Fresh from the oven: Juicy bundt cake creations that will delight. Perfectly shaped and wonderfully fluffy – that's how the bundt cake tastes. For connoisseurs: Serve bundt cake slices with elegant decoration. GREBLON B2+ non-stick coating Our Grizzly baking pans, made in Germany from high-quality carbon steel, are sturdy and durable. Thanks to the ceramic-reinforced GREBLON B2+ non-stick coating by Weilburger, baking results are easily released. Our non-stick bundt cake pan is heat-resistant up to 230°C. To protect the coating, hand washing is recommended.
